failure_reason: local-gradient gate not run; controller cross-partial shows the controller pays alone (trait h is not the causal agent)

gates.name: controller_cross_partial
gates.question: Do trait h and controller niche_weight interact synergistically (cross-partial > 0)?
gates.metric: births/step at 4 corners of (thermosense x niche_weight)
gates.interpretation: Cross-partial verdict: CONTROLLER_PAYS_ALONE.  dB_dtheta_lo_h=0.147 > eps, dB_dh_lo_theta=-0.0456 <= eps, dB_dh_hi_theta=-0.0412 <= eps: controller pays; trait does not.  This is a PREFLIGHT measurement, NOT a full co-adaptation run.  The corners are measured in isolation; actual co-evolutionary dynamics (e.g. the controller evolving to exploit the trait) are not captured here.

gates.name: null_guards
gates.question: Do all null/anti-cheat guards pass?

guards.name: cost_off_disconnected_byte_identical
guards.reason: events_hash identical for h=0.1 and h=0.45 when trait disconnected

guards.name: no_direct_h_reward
guards.reason: assert_no_direct_h_reward passed: enable_thermosense=True, freeze=True, founder_mix set

guards.name: perfect_percept_null
guards.reason: perfect_percept_null requires a matched (null vs non-null) comparison run that this guard does not construct; left NOT_IMPLEMENTED (no spurious PASS). Guard 1 (byte-identity when disconnected) covers the anti-cheat property here.

guards.name: frozen_memory_map
guards.reason: frozen_memory_map is a documented interface (the creature's learned resource map could substitute for sensor skill), but no freeze_learning_rate check or separate no-memory control run is implemented in this gate.  Left NOT_IMPLEMENTED; enable_band_staleness + freeze_learning_rate is the relevant engine knob.

guards.name: shuffle_order
guards.reason: base_cfg.shuffle_creature_order=True: id-order eat-first confound is neutralised

gates.interpretation: Guard battery: PASS=['cost_off_disconnected_byte_identical', 'no_direct_h_reward', 'trait_disabled_null', 'shuffle_order']; NOT_IMPLEMENTED/NA=['population_validity', 'perfect_percept_null', 'frozen_memory_map'].  all_pass=True (counts only PASS/FAIL; NOT_IMPLEMENTED/NA do not fail).  A positive gradient verdict should be treated as an artifact if any guard FAILs.
